stemHtml: Compare two points at the same latitude and longitude, point A being at Mean Sea Level and point B at 10 000 ft altitude. At point B, sunrise will occur:

options.a: Earlier, due to more light being refracted from the atmosphere.
options.b: Later, due to reduced visual horizon.
options.c: Earlier, due to the increased visual horizon.
options.d: Later, due to less light being refracted from the atmosphere.
